nasb.text: The young men of On and of Pi-beseth Will fall by the sword, And the women will go into captivity.

esv.text: The young men of On and of Pi-beseth shall fall by the sword, and the women shall go into captivity.

cnv.text: 亞文和比伯實的年輕人 都必倒在刀下； 這些城的人必被擄去。

ccb.text: 亚文和比伯实的壮丁必死于刀下， 众城都要遭受掳掠。
